title: Datafied Taiwanese Fruit Bowl
concept: A decorative sensory database where each fruit becomes a data object of taste, color, origin, nutrition, history, and cultural memory.

fruits.history: Mango became strongly associated with southern Taiwan’s fruit culture and summer desserts.
fruits.marquee_text: MANGO // 芒果 // golden sweetness, summer sunlight, tropical softness, vitamin C, Tainan memory, shaved-ice nostalgia

fruits.history: Pineapple is deeply connected to Taiwan’s agricultural export history and local pastry culture.
fruits.marquee_text: PINEAPPLE // 鳳梨 // bright acidity, fibrous sweetness, golden luck, pastry memory, agricultural history, tropical sharpness

fruits.history: Guava is a common everyday fruit in Taiwan, often eaten fresh, chilled, or with plum powder.
fruits.marquee_text: GUAVA // 芭樂 // green crunch, everyday fruit, plum powder, vitamin C, market freshness, quiet sweetness

fruits.history: Starfruit is known in Taiwan both as a fresh fruit and as a traditional sweet-sour juice.
fruits.marquee_text: STARFRUIT // 楊桃 // edible geometry, sweet-sour water, yellow star, traditional juice, cooling memory

fruits.history: Dragon fruit became popular in Taiwan as a visually striking tropical crop with both white and red flesh varieties.
fruits.marquee_text: DRAGON FRUIT // 火龍果 // white flesh, black seeds, mild sweetness, tropical contrast, visual data, soft texture

fruits.history: Papaya is commonly used in Taiwan as a fresh fruit and in papaya milk, a familiar beverage culture icon.
fruits.marquee_text: PAPAYA // 木瓜 // orange softness, papaya milk, creamy sweetness, vitamin A, tropical body, breakfast memory

fruits.history: Wax apple is strongly associated with southern Taiwan, especially Pingtung’s fruit-growing regions.
fruits.marquee_text: WAX APPLE // 蓮霧 // crisp red bell, watery sweetness, southern orchard, floral freshness, cool bite

fruits.history: Lychee carries a long cultural history across East Asia and is often associated with luxury, seasonality, and fragrance.
fruits.marquee_text: LYCHEE // 荔枝 // red shell, pearl flesh, floral sweetness, early summer, historical luxury, fragrant data

marquee_sequence: DATAFIED FRUIT BOWL // perception becomes structure // taste becomes color // memory becomes metadata
MANGO // 芒果 // golden sweetness, summer sunlight, tropical softness, vitamin C, Tainan memory, shaved-ice nostalgia
PINEAPPLE // 鳳梨 // bright acidity, fibrous sweetness, golden luck, pastry memory, agricultural history, tropical sharpness
GUAVA // 芭樂 // green crunch, everyday fruit, plum powder, vitamin C, market freshness, quiet sweetness
STARFRUIT // 楊桃 // edible geometry, sweet-sour water, yellow star, traditional juice, cooling memory
DRAGON FRUIT // 火龍果 // white flesh, black seeds, mild sweetness, tropical contrast, visual data, soft texture
PAPAYA // 木瓜 // orange softness, papaya milk, creamy sweetness, vitamin A, tropical body, breakfast memory
WAX APPLE // 蓮霧 // crisp red bell, watery sweetness, southern orchard, floral freshness, cool bite
LYCHEE // 荔枝 // red shell, pearl flesh, floral sweetness, early summer, historical luxury, fragrant data
